title: How to refer a friend in the Individual plan?
excerpt:
Hello, 
we are evaluating monday.com with a free account and need 600 items - what is the procedure of referring two friends to raise the available items? 
Thank you 
Warm regards, 
Fotis.

posts.author: fotdaou (Fotis Daoussis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

we are evaluating monday.com with a free account and need 600 items - what is the procedure of referring two friends to raise the available items?

Thank you

Warm regards,
Fotis.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, @fotdaou - Welcome to the community! We’re thrilled to hear you want to share monday with your friends. This support page includes directions on how to do it under the section titled “How do I earn items?”. It’s about half way down the page - https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360010487220-Understanding-the-Individual-Plan

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
